overview.description: Vietnam's media and entertainment market is driven by streaming, gaming, and digital advertising. AI use cases include content recommendation, personalization, automated content generation, and audience analytics.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$3B digital media market; 70M+ social media users; gaming market ~$900M
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$25B media market; strong growth in streaming, gaming, short-form video

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Very high — streaming platforms generate massive behavioral data
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: High on platforms; low for traditional media publishers transitioning digital

painPoints.problem: Content discovery on large platforms is overwhelming without personalization
Content moderation at scale (hate speech, misinformation) is impossible manually
Ad targeting effectiveness is low; brands demand better audience segmentation
Generating localized Vietnamese content at scale requires AI assistance

relatedNodes.description: Gaming and media share recommendation, engagement, and content AI patterns.
Media and marketing share audience analytics and ad targeting.
